mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals tighter monetary policy, which raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates a tight labor market, which boosts corporate profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE < 4.5%, despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate and CPI inflation signal stagflationary pressures, which reduce corporate earnings growth and lead to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL rise but SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 4.5% indicates an active monetary tightening cycle, which raises borrowing costs and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in industrial production above 110 indicates strong supply-side growth, which boosts corporate output and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO > 110.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts above 1800 thousand units signals strong demand for construction, which drives corporate revenue growth and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST > 1800.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls and declining unemployment indicates a robust labor market, which increases consumer spending and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Both PAYEMS and UNRATE show favorable trends but SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real sales (RSAFS) above 360,000 million dollars indicates strong consumer demand, which drives corporate earnings and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where RSAFS > 360000.
